title: Integrate FeedbackButtons into SocialCard & ReleaseCard
commit_message: US-REM-003: Integrate FeedbackButtons into SocialCard & ReleaseCard
acceptance_criteria_met: SocialCard with feedItemId prop - Component renders - FeedbackButtons visible in footer - getByTestId('social-card-feedback') exists
ReleaseCard with feedItemId prop - Component renders - FeedbackButtons visible in footer - getByTestId('release-card-feedback') exists
User taps feedback on SocialCard - onPress fires - Mutation called, state updates - api.feeds.submitFeedback called
User taps feedback on ReleaseCard - onPress fires - Mutation called, state updates - api.feeds.submitFeedback called
implementation_summary: Successfully integrated FeedbackButtons into SocialCard and ReleaseCard following the exact pattern from VideoCard (US-REM-002). Both components now support the feedItemId prop, which enables feedback functionality with Convex state management and mutations. All tests pass including 11 new tests for feedback integration.
